languages.text: Бог-Император видит, вы пытались решить дело миром. Это наблюдали и ваши союзники, и дух их окреп.

traits.locale_text: Бог-Император видит, вы пытались решить дело миром. Это наблюдали и ваши союзники, и дух их окреп.

languages.text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.
languages.original_text: Бог-Император видит, вы пытались решить дело миром. Это наблюдали и ваши союзники, и дух их окреп.

traits.locale_text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.
The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.
The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.

languages.text: Der Gottimperator sieht, dass du versucht hast, die Angelegenheit friedlich zu regeln. Dasselbe gilt für deine Verbündeten, deren Moral dadurch gestärkt wurde.
languages.original_text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.

traits.locale_text: Der Gottimperator sieht, dass du versucht hast, die Angelegenheit friedlich zu regeln. Dasselbe gilt für deine Verbündeten, deren Moral dadurch gestärkt wurde.

languages.text: 神皇见证了你试图和平解决此事的努力。你的盟友也看到了这一切，他们的士气因此得到了提振。
languages.original_text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.

traits.locale_text: 神皇见证了你试图和平解决此事的努力。你的盟友也看到了这一切，他们的士气因此得到了提振。

languages.text: L'Empereur-Dieu a vu vos efforts pour trouver une résolution pacifique. Vos alliés en ont également été témoins, ce qui a renforcé leur moral.
languages.original_text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.

traits.locale_text: L'Empereur-Dieu a vu vos efforts pour trouver une résolution pacifique. Vos alliés en ont également été témoins, ce qui a renforcé leur moral.

languages.text: El Dios Emperador reconoce que has intentado zanjar el asunto de manera pacífica. Tus aliados también lo han presenciado, y eso fortalece su ánimo.
languages.original_text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.

traits.locale_text: El Dios Emperador reconoce que has intentado zanjar el asunto de manera pacífica. Tus aliados también lo han presenciado, y eso fortalece su ánimo.

languages.text: Tanrı İmparator, bu meseleyi barışçıl bir şekilde çözmeye çalıştığını görüyor. Müttefiklerin de buna tanık olunca moralleri yükseldi.
languages.original_text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.

traits.locale_text: Tanrı İmparator, bu meseleyi barışçıl bir şekilde çözmeye çalıştığını görüyor. Müttefiklerin de buna tanık olunca moralleri yükseldi.

languages.text: 神皇帝は、あなたが平和的に解決しようと努めたことを知っています。あなたの同盟国もこの様子を見ており、彼らの士気は高まっています。
languages.original_text: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.

traits.locale_text: 神皇帝は、あなたが平和的に解決しようと努めたことを知っています。あなたの同盟国もこの様子を見ており、彼らの士気は高まっています。
